expect: NK tracking at N=1007: K_avg ~ 3.1-3.2 (extrapolating 0.00162/L rate from S434 N=924). Hub z should exceed 86.3. Sink% should continue declining below 24%. L-601 K_max ~ 200+ (super-linear PA).
actual: VERIFIED via nk_null_model.py (1000 trials, N=1009). K_avg=3.048 (rate 0.000583/L, 64% deceleration from 0.00162). K_max=238 (L-601). Hub z=99.8 (was 86.3, +15.6%). Gini z=23.8 (was 17.1, +39%). Isolation z=6.4 (was 5.5, +16%). Sinks=25.6% (was 24.0%, REVERSAL). Hub-fraction top-3: 10.5% (L-601:238 + L-613:46 + L-001:39). Top-5: 12.7%. Super-linear PA ratio: 2.75x (was 3.26x, decelerating). Asymptote: 70.5% of 4.32 ceiling (was 69.4%). All metrics GENUINELY NON-RANDOM (p<0.001).
diff: K_avg prediction MISSED (3.048 vs 3.1-3.2, below range — rate decelerated 64%). Hub z CONFIRMED (99.8 > 86.3, exceeded by 15.6%). Sinks MISSED (25.6% vs <24%, first increase in 200+ lessons of tracking). K_max CONFIRMED (238 > 200). 2 of 4 predictions confirmed, 2 missed. Key finding: CRYSTALLIZATION REGIME — K_avg growth stalling while hub dominance and inequality accelerate. New edges flow to hubs; new nodes accumulate as uncited sinks.
verdict: PARTIALLY_CONFIRMED: hub z and K_max met; K_avg below range (deceleration sharper than predicted); sink reversal contradicts monotonic decline trend

prediction_scorecard.note: Rate decelerated 64% from 0.00162 to 0.000583/L. Approaching 4.32 asymptote (70.5%)

First reversal in 200+ lessons — crystallization signal. 258 sinks out of 1009 nodes

key_finding: CRYSTALLIZATION REGIME at N=1009. K_avg growth rate dropped 64% (0.00162 to 0.000583/L) while hub z grew 15.6% and Gini z grew 39%. Sink% reversed from 24.0% to 25.6% for the first time in 200+ lessons of monotonic decline. New lessons arrive as orphans (sinks) while new citation edges preferentially attach to existing hubs (especially L-601 at 238 incoming). The graph is crystallizing around its hub structure. PA ratio decelerating (2.75x vs 3.26x) suggests L-601 approaching citation saturation. At current rate, K_avg=3.5 not expected until N~1800.
lesson_candidates: K_avg growth deceleration at N=1000: structural ceiling approaching (70.5% of asymptote). Rate-halving every ~80 lessons.
Sink reversal at N=1009: first increase in 200+ lessons. Crystallization signal — new nodes add faster than they get cited.
PA ratio deceleration (3.26x to 2.75x): hub citation saturation beginning. L-601 at 238 incoming may be approaching natural ceiling.
